sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂרין שׁריון

Transliteration: shiryôn śiryôn

Phonetic: shir-yone'

BDB Definition:

Sirion = "breastplate"
  1. one of the names of Mount Hermon this one used by the Sidonians

Origin: the same as H8302 (ie sheeted with snow)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name
